headlines.description: — Donovan Mitchell refused to let another fourth-quarter lead slip away from the Cleveland Cavaliers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Donovan Mitchell scores 43 and Cavaliers beat the Pacers 126-104 to cut series deficit to 2-1

events.name: Oklahoma City Thunder at Denver Nuggets

headlines.description: — The Denver Nuggets knew bouncing back from their 43-point loss would mean hanging with the tubro-charged, top-seeded Oklahoma City Thunder...
headlines.shortLinkText: Murray and Porter lead the Nuggets to a 113-104 bounce-back win over the Thunder
